name: compute_monthly_summary
payload:
-- Multi-statement SQL: temp tables + final aggregation
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_monthly_orders AS
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date::TIMESTAMP) AS order_month,
  product_id,
  SUM(quantity) AS total_qty,
  SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customers
FROM order_items
WHERE order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date::TIMESTAMP), product_id;

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_inventory_avg AS
SELECT
  product_id,
  AVG(quantity_on_hand::NUMERIC) AS avg_stock,
  MIN(quantity_on_hand) AS min_stock,
  MAX(quantity_on_hand) AS max_stock
FROM inventory_snapshots
WHERE snapshot_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY product_id;

SELECT
  o.order_month,
  o.product_id,
  o.total_qty,
  o.total_revenue,
  o.unique_customers,
  COALESCE(i.avg_stock, 0)::NUMERIC(12,2) AS avg_stock,
  COALESCE(i.min_stock, 0) AS min_stock,
  CASE
    WHEN i.avg_stock > 0 THEN (o.total_qty / i.avg_stock)::NUMERIC(5,2)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS stock_turnover_ratio
FROM tmp_monthly_orders o
LEFT JOIN tmp_inventory_avg i USING (product_id)
ORDER BY o.order_month DESC, o.total_revenue DESC;
